$comment: Cascade hooks configuration for windsurf-unlocked starter kit.
All hooks ship DISABLED by default — flip 'enabled': true on the ones you want.

pre_tool_use.name: secret-scan-on-write
pre_tool_use.description: Scan file-write tool calls for leaked secrets. Blocks the write on CRITICAL findings.

post_tool_use.name: auto-format-on-write
post_tool_use.description: Run the project formatter on any file Cascade wrote or edited.

post_cascade_response_with_transcript.name: langfuse-logger
post_cascade_response_with_transcript.description: Pipe every Cascade response into Langfuse for tracing and eval. Requires LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY / LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY env vars.

post_cascade_response_with_transcript.name: wiki-updater
post_cascade_response_with_transcript.description: After any session that made a decision, fact, or state change, auto-invoke the wiki-update skill to keep vault/ current.

post_setup_worktree.name: seed-worktree
post_setup_worktree.description: When Cascade creates a new worktree, copy .env and install dependencies so the worktree is immediately runnable.

pre_commit.name: secret-scan-full
pre_commit.description: Belt-and-suspenders: scan the full staged diff for secrets before any commit from Cascade.
